roles.name: Detective Lead
roles.description: Top detective on the floor — designs the over-arching case strategy and keeps the squad's solution tight.

roles.name: Sergeant of the Squad
roles.description: Runs the briefing, holds the timeline, and answers to the Captain.

roles.name: Evidence Locker Custodian
roles.description: Steward of records, layouts, fields and permission sets — every chain of custody intact.

roles.name: Crime Scene Tech
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform features at the precinct lab bench.

roles.name: Precinct Captain
roles.description: Sets standards across the whole precinct's Salesforce craft and mentors senior detectives.

roles.name: Senior Detective
roles.description: Patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced craft and a closed-case streak.

roles.name: Beat Detective
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the borough under the Senior Detective's eye.

roles.name: FBI Liaison
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the federal systems beyond.

roles.name: Inter-Agency Senior Officer
roles.description: Lays the wires of API, middleware, and event flows under the FBI Liaison's plan.

roles.name: Inter-Agency Officer
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the precinct patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Internal Affairs Investigator
roles.description: Tests every closed case for cracks — finds the bugs before they reach the DA.

roles.name: Public Information Lieutenant
roles.description: Lifts the precinct banner — leads all marketing and community-outreach craft.

roles.name: Senior PR Officer
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather support for the precinct.

roles.name: Community Liaison Officer
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the borough — content, creative, and the daily walkabout.

roles.name: Case Profiler
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between Captain and the field detectives.

roles.name: Senior Crime Scene Tech
roles.description: Lead forge of Apex and LWC — owns the harder bench-work and reviews junior code.

roles.name: Rookie Detective
roles.description: First year on the squad — shadows the Senior Detective and runs the simpler cases.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: 99 Detective Squad — Bullpen Case Management Rollout
Criminal Underworld — Most Wanted Intel Implementation

99-detective-squad.name: Roll Call
99-detective-squad.description: Discovery sign-off — bullpen briefing complete, badges issued.

99-detective-squad.name: Halloween Heist Kickoff
99-detective-squad.description: Build kickoff: the annual heist begins, all hands on deck.

99-detective-squad.name: Mid-Shift Check-In
99-detective-squad.description: Mid-project gate: case board review with the Sergeant.

99-detective-squad.name: Closed-Case Invoice
99-detective-squad.description: Phase invoice trigger: closed cases sent to the DA.

99-detective-squad.name: NOICE — Go-Live
99-detective-squad.description: Go-Live: the new bullpen system goes live, cool cool cool.

99-detective-squad.name: Shift Hand-off
99-detective-squad.description: Hyper-care close: night shift takes over.

99-command.name: Captain's Inaugural Briefing
99-command.description: Project kickoff: Holt addresses the precinct from his office.

99-command.name: Move into the Corner Office
99-command.description: Build phase: command center stood up, plaque hung.

99-command.name: Press Conference Dry Run
99-command.description: UAT gate: PR strategy rehearsed with the Lieutenant.

99-command.name: Promotion Ceremony
99-command.description: Go-Live: ranks and badges officially updated in the system.

99-command.name: Year-End Review
99-command.description: Hyper-care close: Holt's annual evaluation cycle.

99-command.name: Final Command Invoice
99-command.description: Final invoice: command center fully operational.

cross-precincts-feds.name: Joint Task Force Stand-Up
cross-precincts-feds.description: Discovery: federal partnership agreed, badges cross-issued.

cross-precincts-feds.name: Wire-Tap Goes Live
cross-precincts-feds.description: Build: surveillance integrations deployed across agencies.

cross-precincts-feds.name: FBI Audit
cross-precincts-feds.description: Solution review with Special Agent Anderson.

cross-precincts-feds.name: Sting Operation
cross-precincts-feds.description: Go-Live: joint sting executes, the perp is in cuffs.

cross-precincts-feds.name: Witness Protection Hand-off
cross-precincts-feds.description: Project close: protected witnesses relocated, case sealed.

cross-precincts-feds.name: Federal Final Invoice
cross-precincts-feds.description: Final invoice from the inter-agency unit.

criminal-underworld.name: Pontiac Bandit Tip-Off
criminal-underworld.description: Kickoff: Doug Judy phones in the first lead.

criminal-underworld.name: Heist Plan Drafted
criminal-underworld.description: Discovery: getaway route mapped, disguises picked.

criminal-underworld.name: Vulture Tries to Steal Credit
criminal-underworld.description: UAT acceptance: Pembroke shows up uninvited, gets denied.

criminal-underworld.name: Cuffs On, Case Closed
criminal-underworld.description: Go-Live + handoff: the underworld network busted, perps booked.

Jake Peralta.notes: Die Hard marathon — yippee-ki-yay personal day.

Amy Santiago.notes: Sergeant's exam study retreat — color-coded binders only.

Rosa Diaz.notes: Motorcycle maintenance — none of your business.

Terry Jeffords.notes: Yogurt convention in Vermont with Sharon and the twins.

Gina Linetti.notes: Dance crew Floorgasm performance — front row required.

Doug Judy.notes: Lying low — heat is on, will resurface in Vegas.

The Vulture.notes: Stealing credit at a different precinct.
